Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0489 "THUNDERBIRDS-GRANDSLAM-PART2-0489" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Thunderbirds (Mission 2 - Sub Crash) (Grandslam) (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out the JSR $C017 at $BAE2 to remove the password protection. The loading screen is from the Spectrum version.
